settings.title: M-Series 3rd Gen Adaptive Lumbar Support
settings.content: Features 6-stop front/back adjustment (60mm travel), 50mm auto-vertical adaptation, and 5° adaptive rotation—delivering complete lumbar-to-back alignment for optimal support.

settings.title: Massage System
settings.content: Building on its advanced lumbar massage, the newly added leg massage technology delivers full-body relief—combating sedentary fatigue to keep you supported and focused during extended gaming or work sessions.

settings.title: World's First Ventilated & Heated Esports Throne
settings.content: Smart climate control for all seasons: 3 manual settings deliver 19°C cooling or 42°C heating. Maintain optimal comfort during extended use.

settings.title: Dynamic Tracking Lumbar Support
settings.content: The auto-tracking support moves where you move—up/down/forward/back—to crush lower back pain before it starts. Perfect for 5'4" to 6'5" gamers, with one-knob tension control that remembers your sweet spot. No more slouching, just pro-grade posture for those 12-hour raid nights.

settings.title: World's first in the industry
settings.content: Upgraded to 3rd-gen dynamic tracking lumbar support

settings.title: Lumbar Massage System
settings.content: Relieve back pain with the lumbar support's built-in massage feature, featuring two high-frequency vibration motors to keep you relaxed and comfortable during long gaming or work sessions.

settings.title: Leg Massage System
settings.content: Ease muscle fatigue and improve circulation with two built-in high-frequency vibration motors located in the leg rest. Designed to deliver a soothing massage during long hours of work or gaming, this feature helps reduce tension and keeps your legs relaxed and refreshed.

settings.title: World's First Ventilated & Heated Esports Throne
settings.content:
Master every season with smart climate control: Dual turbo fans blast 66°F cooling air to prevent swamp-ass during ranked grind, while carbon-fiber heating (up to 122°F) tackles winter chill.
3-speed one-touch presets let you switch from frosty headshots to cozy AFK moments instantly. No more sweaty backs or numb legs.

settings.title: 3D ErgoCloud Neck Pillow
settings.content: The 3D ergo-cloud headrest cradles your neck with memory foam, adapting to your movements. Its semi-wrap design reduces 30% cervical pressure during long sessions.

settings.title: Unique 60° wraparound design
settings.content: Reduces pressure at the occipital region andalleviates neck strain.

settings.title: WHAT DOES YOUR WARRANTY COVER?
settings.content: Every AutoFull product is designed and tested for industry-leading safety and durability. That’s why we stand behind all our chairs and desks with up to a 3-year extended warranty. Aesthetic defects and damage due to misuse of product are not covered.To make a warranty claim, submit your claim via our Contact page, along with image or video evidence of the affected area. AutoFull reserves the final right to determine if a benefit under the warranty can be claimed.
